svg.text: Multi-Party Federated Confidential Computing - Architecture Overview
4 Confidential Containers · AKS Virtual Nodes · Nginx Reverse Proxy (ports 80/8081/8082/8083)

g.text: 📁 Own data stored locally in TEE

svg.text: 📊 Aggregate insights only (no raw data crosses TEE)
• Each container can only release its own key — no cross-company key access
• Woodgrove orchestrates via HTTP, collecting pre-computed aggregates
• No shared storage — all data encrypted & stored locally in each TEE
1. Each container boots in AMD SEV-SNP TEE
3. Key Vault releases only that container's key
4. Each partner decrypts & analyzes own data locally
5. Raw PII never leaves any partner's TEE boundary
6. Woodgrove collects aggregate results via HTTP
7. Combined report uses no individual records
